⚡ Anomaly Thresholds & Business Classification Rules

⚡ Critical Spike

Revenue Spike is ≥ 200%. Minimum 10 units sold on the latest day to avoid low-volume false triggers.

▲ Volumetric Spike

Revenue Spike is ≥ 80%. Minimum 5 units sold on the latest day. Indicates strong momentum.

▼ Volumetric Drop

Revenue Spike is ≤ -55%. Trailing average units sold must be ≥ 2.0. Catches sudden momentum slow-downs.

🚨 Critical Drop

Revenue Spike is ≤ -85% with trailing average units sold ≥ 4.0, or latest day units sold dropped to 0 units from a baseline average ≥ 3.0. High stockout/outage risk.
